ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "theme" TEXT /* Theme or project associated with the dataset */,
  "source" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the dataset */,
  "variable_name" TEXT /* Name of the variable measured in the dataset */,
  "variable_type" TEXT /* Type of the variable (e.g., Continuous, Categorical) */,
  "resolution" REAL /* Spatial resolution of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset and its contents */,
  "web_link" TEXT /* Web link to access the dataset or related documentation */,
  "data_coverage_area" TEXT /* Geographical area covered by the dataset */,
  "date_of_collection" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* File format of the dataset */,
  "data_size" REAL /* Size of the dataset */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the dataset */,
  "access_control" TEXT /* Access control settings for the dataset */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the dataset (e.g., accuracy, completeness) */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags for easier categorization and search */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_source FOREIGN KEY ("source") REFERENCES sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variables" (
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variable */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset containing the variable */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the variable */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the variable (e.g., Continuous, Categorical) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the variable */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement of the variable */,
  "range_min" REAL /* Minimum value of the variable */,
  "range_max" REAL /* Maximum value of the variable */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the variable (e.g., integer, float, string) */,
  "temporal_resolution" TEXT /* Temporal resolution of the variable (e.g., daily, monthly) */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the variable data (e.g., accuracy, completeness) */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags for easier categorization and search */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variable_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variables_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the organization or institution providing the data */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the data source */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the data source */,
  "license" TEXT /* License under which the data is provided */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Overall quality of the data provided by the source (e.g., accuracy, completeness) */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating for the source based on data quality and reliability */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags for easier categorization and search */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)
